key_findings: p469: CONFIRMED R9-A flag вҖ” q::1 choices[2-3] retain raw 'гӮҰ./гӮЁ.' in BOTH zh and en; q::2 EN labels romanise katakana as 'гӮў./i./u./e.' instead of A/B/C/D. RELEASE-BLOCKING.

p552: q::3 zh choices retain raw 'гӮў/гӮӨ/гӮҰ/гӮЁ' while q0/q1/q2 use з”І/д№ҷ/дёҷ/дёҒ вҖ” within-page convention split. RELEASE-BLOCKING.
p552: zh choice-label convention з”І/д№ҷ/дёҷ/дёҒ mismatches en A/B/C/D вҖ” cross-lang side-by-side study impaired (polish).
p109: EN chapter title 'Management Strategy Management' tautological; recommend 'Strategic Management' (polish).
